pages.text: Dried foods can be made by placing raw counterparts a wall for up to a few days to allow it to dry. Once it's dried, you can pick it up and eat as much as you like.
Created by placing raw sausage on a wall and allowing it to dry for a few days.
pages.title: Dried Beef Sausage

pages.text: Created by placing Fruit Paste on a wall and allowing it to dry for a few days.
pages.title: Fruit Jerky

pages.text: Created by placing Mushroom Paste on a wall and allowing it to dry for a few days.
pages.title: Mushroom Jerky
